---
params:
    SOtable: 
    QC: 
    sim_file: 
title: "S/O table"
author: "Consultancy team"
date: "Compiled on `r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')` from so_table function"
output: word_document
    
---

```{r set-options, echo=FALSE}

suppressWarnings(library(knitr))

opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, 
               fig.width = 4,
               fig.height = 6.5,
               fig.align = "center",
               dpi = 600,
               message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

knit_print.data.frame = function(x, ...) {
    res = paste(c("", "", kable(x, row.names = FALSE)), collapse = "\n")
    asis_output(res)
}


```
```{r Housekeeping}

library(tidyverse)
library(SimcypConsultancy)


```

Simulator output file: `r params$sim_file`

# Table

```{r}

params$SOtable %>% kable()

```

## QC info

```{r}

params$QC %>% kable()

```
